name: newspaper
description: Builds a newspaper-style summary from project or external inputs, organizing findings into a readable generated artifact.

inputs.name: topics
inputs.description: Topics to include in the digest.

inputs.name: output_dir
inputs.description: Optional output directory for digest markdown.

consolidator.prompt_template:
Merge the research into a readable daily newspaper-style markdown digest. Group by topic, keep it concise, and include caveats.

If job_payload.output_dir is set, write the digest markdown there.

End with exactly:
STANCE: ok
